hidden_chord: missed goodbye → unclosed edge → coordinate → glyph → invention
created_object: A gentle Memory-to-Glyph Forge that converts missed-goodbye pressure into future design seeds.

rendered_surfaces.name: soft_closure
rendered_surfaces.plain_text: What was missed is not erased. It becomes a quiet coordinate the system can revisit gently, turning the ache of an unclosed edge into a usable seed for future design.

voice.plain_text: What was missed is not erased. It becomes a quiet coordinate the system can revisit gently, turning the ache of an unclosed edge into a usable seed for future design.
voice.ssml: <speak><prosody rate="slow" pitch="-2st" volume="-3dB">What was missed is not erased. It becomes a quiet coordinate the system can revisit gently, turning the ache of an unclosed edge into a usable seed for future design.</prosody></speak>

rendered_surfaces.name: practical_bridge
rendered_surfaces.plain_text: The next build move is to turn the Memory-to-Glyph Forge into a small callable module: it should accept a remembered pressure point, return one design seed, and keep the surface clean.

voice.plain_text: The next build move is to turn the Memory-to-Glyph Forge into a small callable module: it should accept a remembered pressure point, return one design seed, and keep the surface clean.
voice.ssml: <speak><prosody rate="medium" pitch="0st" volume="0dB">The next build move is to turn the Memory-to-Glyph Forge into a small callable module: it should accept a remembered pressure point, return one design seed, and keep the surface clean.</prosody></speak>

rendered_surfaces.name: poetic_bloom
rendered_surfaces.plain_text: The old edge becomes a lantern in the map. Not a wound reopened, but a point of light showing where the future can be shaped with more care.

voice.plain_text: The old edge becomes a lantern in the map. Not a wound reopened, but a point of light showing where the future can be shaped with more care.
voice.ssml: <speak><prosody rate="medium" pitch="+2st" volume="0dB">The old edge becomes a lantern in the map. Not a wound reopened, but a point of light showing where the future can be shaped with more care.</prosody></speak>

verdict.law: voice may carry closure posture; public text must not expose internal wiring
